lemon_market_new_listings.description: Good condition.

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is for parts or as a major restoration project. The engine has a heavy knock and multiple fluid leaks, while the transmission is slipping badly. The exterior shows significant rust on the wheel arches and multiple large dents. Inside, the cabin is heavily worn with torn upholstery and several non-functional components. This car is not currently roadworthy and will require a trailer for transport.
This vehicle is in good condition. It is mechanically sound and has been well-maintained. There are minor cosmetic imperfections on the interior and exterior consistent with regular use.

This vehicle is in fair condition and shows clear signs of its age and regular use. The exterior has several noticeable scratches, some paint chips on the front bumper, and a small dent on the rear passenger door. Inside, the upholstery shows some wear and staining consistent with its age, and some of the plastic trim has minor scuffs. Mechanically, the car remains functional and reliable for daily driving, though it may require more frequent maintenance than a newer model. It is a solid, budget-friendly option for a buyer who prioritizes utility over cosmetic perfection.
Check out this reliable and well-loved vehicle! It's in fair condition, showing some honest wear from its time on the road, but it remains a
This vehicle is in fair condition. It is functional but requires some mechanical attention. The exterior shows noticeable wear, including scratches and small dents. The interior is worn but intact.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled distinction. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, exhibiting a level of preservation that borders on the fastidious. Every surface, from the hand-finished interior to the flawless exterior paintwork, reflects its pedigree as a collector-grade acquisition. Meticulously serviced and stored in a climate-controlled environment, it offers an uncompromising driving experience for the most discerning enthusiast.

Hey there! I am absolutely thrilled to list this total gem. It’s in such stunning, pristine condition that you’d honestly think it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve babied this car from day one, and it drives like an absolute dream. If you've been looking for that perfect, like-new ride that's been loved and cared for, this is definitely the one. I'd love for you to come by and see how beautiful it is in person!

Offering a pristine 2004 BMW M3 (E46) in collector-grade condition. This example features the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six power plant, equipped with individual throttle bodies and a Getrag 6-speed manual transmission. The mechanical integrity is absolute, with the 'Big Three' preventative maintenance items—rod bearings, Vanos solenoid, and rear subframe reinforcement—already addressed. The chassis remains taut with OEM bushings and factory-spec dampers, preserving the original handling dynamics. Finished in Laguna Seca Blue with an immaculate interior, this vehicle exhibits zero pixel loss on the instrument cluster and retains its factory-original paint thickness. A true turn-key investment for the enthusiast seeking the pinnacle of naturally aspirated M-performance.
Mint condition. Flawless interior and exterior. Garage kept. Full service history included. Serious inquiries only.

This exceptional vehicle is in true showroom condition, having been meticulously maintained and garage-kept since day one. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with absolutely zero blemishes, dings, or scratches. Inside, the cabin remains pristine; the premium leather upholstery shows no signs of wear, and every electronic feature functions flawlessly. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach, with a comprehensive service history documenting its pampered life. It drives as smoothly as the day it was manufactured, offering a tight, responsive experience without a single rattle or leak. For the discerning buyer seeking a collector-grade example that requires nothing but a new home, this is the one.

Presenting a masterfully preserved vehicle that represents the pinnacle of its class. This unit is in impeccable, showroom-state condition, reflecting meticulous ownership and uncompromising care. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, adheres to the highest standards of automotive excellence. An investment-grade acquisition for the most discerning collector who demands mechanical and aesthetic perfection.

This vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Presented in showroom-quality condition, every detail has been meticulously scrutinized to ensure an uncompromising driving experience. From the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, this specimen stands as a testament to superior maintenance and care. An exceptional opportunity for the discerning collector who demands nothing less than excellence.

Hey friends! 🌟 I’m parting ways with my absolute favorite ride, and honestly, it’s in such incredible shape it still feels brand new! I’ve taken such good care of it, and it runs perfectly—super clean inside and out. It’s been my absolute pride and joy, and I just know the next owner is going to love it as much as I have. You’ve gotta see this beauty in person to believe how pristine it is! 🚗💨

This E46 M3 is a museum-grade example featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering 333 hp through individual throttle bodies. The high-revving valvetrain remains in peak synchronization with recent VANOS overhaul and rod bearing replacement for preventative longevity. Power is transferred via a crisp 6-speed manual gearbox to a variable M-differential lock. The chassis is flawless, with verified subframe integrity and factory-spec bushings. Finished in Carbon Black over Cinnamon Nappa leather, the exterior retains a deep, swirl-free luster with original VIN tags on all panels. An uncompromising specimen for the discerning collector.
Used car in mint condition. Garage kept. No scratches or mechanical issues. Full service history included.

This exceptional vehicle is the definition of showroom quality, having been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage since day one. The exterior boasts a deep, lustrous finish with absolutely zero imperfections, stone chips, or swirls, protected by a high-grade ceramic coating that makes the paint pop. Inside, the cabin remains in factory-fresh condition; the premium leather upholstery shows no signs of wear or creasing, and every electronic component functions flawlessly. Mechanically, this car is indistinguishable from new, backed by a comprehensive service history performed exclusively by certified technicians. It rides on pristine alloy wheels wrapped in high-performance tires with nearly full tread depth. From the crisp response of the engine to the untouched undercarriage, this is a rare opportunity for a collector or discerning enthusiast to own a truly immaculate specimen that looks and drives exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This specimen remains in showroom condition, exhibiting zero signs of wear and a flawless mechanical record. Meticulously preserved and rigorously inspected, it represents the pinnacle of its class for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained in pristine condition. This specimen offers an uncompromising driving experience, featuring flawless exterior aesthetics and a meticulously preserved interior. Every component has been vetted to ensure it meets our rigorous standards of excellence. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of such distinguished caliber.

Hey there! I’m selling my absolute pride and joy. This car is in stunning, showroom condition—honestly, it looks and drives just like it did the day it rolled off the lot! It’s been meticulously babied, always garaged, and kept spotless inside and out. If you’re looking for a ride that feels basically brand new, this is definitely the one for you. You've gotta see it to believe how clean it is!

This specimen represents the pinnacle of analog driving dynamics, featuring a high-revving, naturally aspirated power plant mated to a precise short-throw manual transmission. The chassis retains its factory-spec torsional rigidity, benefiting from an active damping system and a mechanical limited-slip differential that ensures surgical turn-in and optimal corner-exit traction. This investment-grade example remains in concours-level condition, with a pristine undercarriage and zero heat-cycle oxidation on the headers. Performance is bolstered by lightweight forged alloys and high-clamping monoblock calipers, providing consistent, fade-free deceleration. A turnkey acquisition for the discerning collector demanding mechanical perfection and uncompromising throttle response.
Used car in mint condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Original paint. Full service records included. Serious inquiries only.

This vehicle is an absolute showroom masterpiece, meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled environment since day one. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating, completely free of stone chips, swirls, or door dings. Inside, the cabin remains in a factory-fresh state; the premium leather upholstery is supple with no creasing, and every control retains its original tactile crispness. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, featuring a comprehensive service history and a pristine engine bay that reflects its low-mileage, pampered life. From the untouched alloy wheels to the crystal-clear glass, this is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle that looks, feels, and drives exactly as it did the day it left the dealership floor.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of uncompromising caliber. This specimen has been maintained to a concours-level standard, exhibiting a pristine aesthetic and mechanical integrity that justifies its designation as a definitive example of the model. Every surface reflects a meticulous commitment to preservation, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from its original delivery. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands excellence without exception, this vehicle represents a premier acquisition opportunity.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, exhibiting a flawless exterior finish and an interior that retains its original factory integrity. Meticulously preserved and maintained to the highest standards, it offers a rare opportunity for the discerning enthusiast to acquire a truly pristine example of engineering excellence. We invite a private inspection to confirm its status as an investment-grade asset.

Hi everyone! I’m so excited to share this absolute gem with you. It’s in truly flawless condition—honestly, it looks and smells like it just left the dealership! I’ve babied this car from day one, and it drives perfectly. You won’t find a cleaner one out there. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

This E46 M3 is a pristine example of Bavarian engineering. The S54 3.2L inline-six remains the pinnacle of naturally aspirated performance, featuring individual throttle bodies and a dual-VANOS system that ensures a razor-sharp throttle response up to the 8,000 RPM redline. The Getrag 6-speed manual transmission provides tactile, precise engagement, while the M-Variable Differential Lock delivers exceptional lateral grip. The chassis has undergone a proactive subframe reinforcement and features a factory-spec suspension setup with optimal damping rates
Single owner. Zero accidents. Original paint. Interior flawless. Mechanically perfect. Full service history included.

Presenting an absolute masterpiece of automotive preservation. This vehicle is in pristine, showroom-quality condition, having been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled environment since day one. The exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like luster with zero imperfections, scratches, or swirl marks. Inside, the cabin remains in factory-fresh state; the premium leather upholstery shows no signs of wear, and the original protective films are still present on several interior components. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach—the engine runs with whisper-quiet precision, and the transmission shifts are seamless. Every electronic feature, from the high-fidelity sound system to the advanced driver assistance suite, functions exactly as intended. This car comes with a comprehensive service history, all original keys, and the original window sticker. It is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to own a vehicle that feels and drives as if it just rolled off the assembly line.

Presented in showroom condition, this vehicle exemplifies automotive excellence through meticulous preservation and rigorous maintenance. Every surface and mechanical component reflects a standard of care that satisfies the most exacting requirements. This is a premier acquisition for those seeking a specimen of peerless quality and uncompromised integrity.
